chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI M.A. NO. 72 OF 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.4211/2023 2. For order on CMA No.4212/2023 3. For order on CMA No.4213/2023 4. For hearing of Main Case 17.03.2025 Shaikh M. Rafiq Advocate for the Appellant..-.-.-.-.-. Instant miscellaneous appeal has been filed against impugned order dated 07.11.2022. It is evident from the record that impugned order passed on 07.11.2022 on application for certified copies which was filed on 06.03.2023, copy was ready and collected by the counsel for the appellant on 09.03.2023. On the point of limitation learned counsel states that his client could not be informed about such order by the previous counsel. Specific query was raised by the Court that as to why appeal was presented on 30.05.2023 when according to him copy of impugned was received by him on 09.03.2023. Learned counsel has filed application under Section 5 of the Limitation Act (CMA No.4211/2023) does not disclose ground to condone the matter. It is well settled law that to condone the delay each and every date should be explained. For such reason instant miscellaneous appellant is dismissed in limine. JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI
